positive: A mystical celestial fauna composition featuring elegant, interconnected silhouettes of glowing fox heads, stylized crescent moons, and interwoven constellations. The design should utilize a deep indigo and ethereal gold color palette, rendered in a clean, modern linework style with negative space contrast. The composition must be perfectly centered and symmetrically arranged, suitable for a chest print on apparel. Emphasize sharp outlines, strong contrast, and a whimsical, dreamlike feeling. Style: High-contrast geometric tattoo flash art combined with sophisticated celestial etching, viewed under perfect studio lighting.
